headline: Why First Solar Stock Is Soaring This Week
summary: After turning a cold shoulder to this solar stock for much of 2026, the market is warming back up to it.

raw.headline: Why First Solar Stock Is Soaring This Week

headline: First Solar (FSLR) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of solar panel manufacturer First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) jumped 11.9% in the afternoon session after GLJ Research upgraded the stock to Buy from Hold and significantly raised its price target.
